subcodes.first_line: ...O Ḥusayn! O thou Preceptor! From His Most Great Prison, the countenance of the Ancient of Days is turned towards thee… Blessed is that teacher who shall arise to instruct the children
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @education of children; moral education
